backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the pickleball app, defining types and shared functions for player profiles, session management, court assignments, match results, and rating updates with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (login, home, profile, session create/join/host/player), enforces a sessionStorage-based auth guard, and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AllRoundsSchedul: Collapsible schedule component that displays all rounds of court assignments and waitlists, highlighting the current player and current round, using client-side scheduled round data.
frontend/src/components/CourtAssignmentC: Card component showing a court's team A and team B player slots with current-player highlighting, optional score entry inputs for ranked sessions, and display of already-submitted scores.
frontend/src/components/GameScheduleInfo: File content was not provided; no summary available.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides two layout components: `Layout` (a page wrapper with optional header, back button, and footer) and `AppHeader` (a sticky app-wide header with logo and logout button).
frontend/src/components/MatchResultSubmi: Renders a card UI for submitting match results, allowing selection of match format (casual/standard/tournament/finals) and displaying both teams before submitting a game outcome.
Displays a player's stats (rating, wins, losses, win rate) in a card with an avatar showing initials or a profile picture.
frontend/src/components/SessionCodeDispl: Shows a game session code with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality, falling back to copy if the Web Share API is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/SessionConfigFor: A form component for configuring a new pickleball session, including court count, date/time/venue, duration, game type (random/round-robin/ladder/king-queen), and ranked toggle.
frontend/src/components/WaitlistPanel.ts: Renders an ordered waitlist of players, highlighting the current user's position, or shows an empty state if no players are waiting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend canister interactions including user profiles, sessions, and player management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a pickleball-themed OKLCH color token system for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/errorHandling.ts: Utility functions for detecting and formatting IC canister errors (stopped, auth, network) and retrying failed calls with exponential backoff.
frontend/src/lib/scheduler.ts: Client-side fair round-robin scheduler that generates court assignments and waitlists for pickleball sessions using a rotating player queue.
frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: LocalStorage helpers for persisting and retrieving player profiles, current session data, and per-session player name mappings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Small utility functions for class name merging, clipboard copying, rating formatting, and principal string shortening.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreateSession.tsx: Page component for creating a new pickleball session, allowing hosts to configure session details and displaying the generated session code upon successful creation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying the app branding, options to resume an active session, set up a profile, create a new game, or join an existing one.
Host dashboard for managing an active session, including player allocation, court assignments, score submission, round management, and viewing the full schedule.
frontend/src/pages/JoinSession.tsx: Page that allows a player to join an existing session by entering a game code, with validation and error handling before navigating to the player view.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page offering Internet Identity sign-in or guest access, storing the auth choice in sessionStorage and redirecting to the home page after authentication.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerSessionView.tsx: React page for the player-facing session view, displaying court assignments, waitlist, match result submission, and a full round schedule with tabs, using session state from API hooks and a fair schedule generator.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: React page for initial player profile creation, collecting name, mobile number (with country code), bio, work field, and profile picture, then saving to both the backend and local storage.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileView.tsx: React page for viewing and editing an existing player profile, pre-populating fields from the backend and local storage, with inline edit/save/cancel controls.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-query/animate plugins, custom fonts, border radii, and box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, and a single pending feature request to rebuild and redeploy the full application after a failed build.
